│ ✻ Claude Code v2.1.152                                             │
│                                                                    │
│   /opt/lit-platform                                                │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

❯ You have 12 identical-looking balls, one is a different weight. Find it.

✻ Thought for 41s

● Label the balls 1–12. The trick is that each weighing has three outcomes
  (left heavy / balanced / right heavy), so three weighings give 3³ = 27
  distinguishable results — plenty to pin down one ball and its direction.

  Weighing 1: {1,2,3,4} vs {5,6,7,8}. If they balance, the odd ball is in

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
⏵ esc to interrupt
